## Evaluation & fixtures

Compare deterministic outputs with text or structured assertions, record/replay one-shot response fixtures, and record agent evaluations.

Commands:
- `output <path>`: compare actual output against expected text/file (dispatch: `eval-output`)
- `run <path>`: run a structured YAML/JSON assertion file (dispatch: `eval-output`)
- `fixtures <dir>`: discover and run structured eval fixtures in a directory (dispatch: `eval-output`)
- `list`: list agent evaluations on --session (dispatch: `session-read`)
- `record <agent>`: append an evaluation to --session (dispatch: `session-write`)
- `record-response <path> <prompt|--stdin>`: run one prompt and write request/response JSON
- `replay-response <path> <prompt|--stdin>`: run one prompt from a recorded response JSON

Examples:
- `atteler eval output .atteler/fixtures/readme-summary.txt --eval-expected "package overview"`
- `atteler eval run .atteler/evals/readme.eval.yaml`
- `atteler eval fixtures .atteler/evals --eval-report .atteler/eval-report.json`
- `atteler eval record reviewer`
- `atteler eval replay-response .atteler/fixtures/once.json "Summarize @README.md"`

## Interactive slash commands

Slash help:

```text
/help /model [name] /profile [name] /save /export [path] /clear /retry /edit /fork [n]
/tokens /cost /search <query> /pin <n> /unpin <n> /context [prune] /mode [plan|execute] /suggestions [status|local|session|folder|global]
/template [name] /codeblocks /save-code <n> <path> /copy [last|session] /copy-code [n] /apply-patch /eval add|run
```

Commands:
- `/help`: show interactive slash command help
  - Input: `slashNoArgsInput`
  - Completion tokens: `commands`
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
- `/model [name]`: show or change the active model
  - Input: `slashOptionalValueInput`
  - Input fields: `Value`
  - Arguments: `name:string optional`
  - Completion tokens: `provider`
  - Side effects: `session-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-session-store`
- `/profile [name]`: show or change the configured agent profile
  - Input: `slashOptionalValueInput`
  - Input fields: `Value`
  - Arguments: `name:string optional`
  - Completion tokens: `agent`
  - Side effects: `config-read`, `session-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-session-store`
- `/save`: save the current session
  - Input: `slashNoArgsInput`
  - Side effects: `session-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-session-store`
- `/export [path]`: export the current session transcript
  - Input: `slashOptionalValueInput`
  - Input fields: `Value`
  - Arguments: `path:string optional`
  - Shared CLI commands: `session-read`
  - Completion tokens: `session`
  - Side effects: `session-store-read`, `stdout`, `filesystem-write`
  - Outputs: `text`, `yaml`, `markdown`, `json`, `filesystem`
  - Policy: `mutates-filesystem`
- `/clear`: clear the visible conversation and persist the empty session
  - Input: `slashNoArgsInput`
  - Side effects: `session-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-conversation`, `mutates-session-store`
- `/retry`: regenerate the last user prompt
  - Input: `slashNoArgsInput`
  - Aliases: `regenerate`
  - Completion tokens: `regenerate`
  - Side effects: `llm-provider-read`, `session-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-conversation`, `mutates-session-store`, `calls-llm`
- `/edit`: edit the last user prompt
  - Input: `slashNoArgsInput`
  - Side effects: `session-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-conversation`
- `/fork [n]`: fork the current session at a message index
  - Input: `slashForkInput`
  - Input fields: `Count`, `HasCount`
  - Arguments: `n:int optional`
  - Completion tokens: `session`
  - Side effects: `session-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-conversation`
- `/tokens`: show token usage and estimated cost
  - Input: `slashNoArgsInput`
  - Aliases: `cost`
  - Help aliases: `cost`
  - Completion tokens: `cost`
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
- `/search <query>`: search the current conversation
  - Input: `slashSearchInput`
  - Input fields: `Query`
  - Arguments: `query:string required, variadic`
  - Completion tokens: `session`
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
- `/pin <n>`: pin a message before pruning context
  - Input: `slashMessageNumberInput`
  - Input fields: `Number`
  - Arguments: `n:int required`
  - Completion tokens: `context`
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-conversation`
- `/unpin <n>`: unpin a message
  - Input: `slashMessageNumberInput`
  - Input fields: `Number`
  - Arguments: `n:int required`
  - Completion tokens: `context`
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-conversation`
- `/context [prune]`: show or prune conversation context
  - Input: `slashContextInput`
  - Input fields: `Prune`
  - Arguments: `prune:enum(prune) optional`
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-conversation`
- `/mode [plan|execute]`: show or switch between plan and execute modes
  - Input: `slashModeInput`
  - Input fields: `Mode`, `Show`
  - Arguments: `mode:enum(plan|execute) optional`
  - Completion tokens: `plan`, `execute`
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-conversation`
- `/suggestions [status|local|session|folder|global]`: show or opt in to model-backed idle prompt suggestions
  - Input: `slashSuggestionsInput`
  - Input fields: `Mode`, `Show`
  - Arguments: `mode:enum(status|local|session|folder|global) optional`
  - Completion tokens: `prompt`, `privacy`, `local`, `provider`
  - Side effects: `llm-provider-read`, `session-store-write`, `state-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-session-store`, `calls-llm`
- `/template [name]`: insert a local prompt template
  - Input: `slashOptionalValueInput`
  - Input fields: `Value`
  - Arguments: `name:string optional`
  - Completion tokens: `prompt`
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
- `/codeblocks`: list code blocks from the last assistant response
  - Input: `slashNoArgsInput`
  - Completion tokens: `code`
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
- `/save-code <n> <path>`: save a code block from the last assistant response
  - Input: `slashSaveCodeInput`
  - Input fields: `Path`, `Block`
  - Arguments: `n:int required`, `path:string required`
  - Completion tokens: `code`
  - Side effects: `filesystem-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `filesystem`, `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-filesystem`
- `/copy [last|session]`: copy the last answer or full session
  - Input: `slashCopyInput`
  - Input fields: `Target`
  - Arguments: `target:enum(last|session) optional`
  - Side effects: `process-execute`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `process`, `text`
  - Policy: `uses-clipboard`
- `/copy-code [n]`: copy a code block, defaulting to the first block
  - Input: `slashCopyCodeInput`
  - Input fields: `Block`
  - Arguments: `n:int optional`
  - Completion tokens: `code`
  - Side effects: `process-execute`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `process`, `text`
  - Policy: `uses-clipboard`
- `/apply-patch`: apply the last assistant unified diff with git apply
  - Input: `slashNoArgsInput`
  - Completion tokens: `patch`
  - Side effects: `process-execute`, `worktree-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `process`, `text`
  - Policy: `runs-local-process`, `mutates-worktree`
- `/eval add|run`: add or count local evaluation cases
  - Input: `slashEvalInput`
  - Input fields: `Action`
  - Arguments: `action:enum(add|run) required`
  - Completion tokens: `test`
  - Variants:
    - `/eval add`: add the current session to local evaluation cases
      - Side effects: `filesystem-write`, `session-store-read`, `stdout`
      - Outputs: `filesystem`, `text`
      - Policy: `mutates-filesystem`
    - `/eval run`: count local evaluation cases
      - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `stdout`
      - Outputs: `text`
  - Side effects: `filesystem-write`, `session-store-read`, `stdout`, `filesystem-read`
  - Outputs: `filesystem`, `text`
  - Policy: `mutates-filesystem`

## Dispatch commands

- `list-hook-events` (providerless): list supported lifecycle hook event types
  - Input: `listHookEventsCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `JSON`
  - Flags: `--list-hook-events`, `--list-hook-events-json`
  - Examples: `atteler config hooks-json`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`, `json`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --list-hook-events` -> `list-hook-events`
- `headless-command` (providerless): inspect, reconcile, stream, cancel, retry, or clean up headless runs
  - Input: `headlessCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `StatusID`, `CancelID`, `RetryID`, `RetryNewID`, `StreamID`, `StatusFilter`, `MaxAge`, `Recover`, `List`, `Cleanup`
  - Flags: `--list-headless`, `--recover-headless`, `--status-headless`, `--cancel-headless`, `--retry-headless`, `--retry-headless-id`, `--stream-headless`, `--cleanup-headless`, `--headless-status`, `--headless-max-age`
  - Examples: `atteler session headless`, `atteler session status-headless run-123`, `atteler session cancel-headless run-123`, `atteler session retry-headless run-123`, `atteler session recover-headless`, `atteler session stream-headless run-123`, `atteler session cleanup-headless --headless-max-age 168h`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `session-store-read`, `session-store-write`, `stdout`, `process-execute`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --list-headless` -> `headless-command`
- `list-sessions` (providerless): list saved sessions
  - Input: `listSessionsCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Tag`
  - Flags: `--list-sessions`, `--list-sessions-tag`
  - Examples: `atteler session list`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `session-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --list-sessions` -> `list-sessions`
- `list-session-tags` (providerless): list saved session tags with counts
  - Input: `listSessionTagsCommandInput`
  - Flags: `--list-session-tags`
  - Examples: `atteler session tags`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `session-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --list-session-tags` -> `list-session-tags`
- `agent-performance-summary` (providerless): summarize recorded agent performance across saved sessions
  - Input: `agentPerformanceSummaryCommandInput`
  - Flags: `--agent-performance-summary`
  - Examples: `atteler agents performance`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `session-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --agent-performance-summary` -> `agent-performance-summary`
- `search-sessions` (providerless): search saved session metadata and transcripts
  - Input: `searchSessionsCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Query`
  - Flags: `--search-sessions`
  - Examples: `atteler session search "auth retry"`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `session-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --search-sessions value` -> `search-sessions`
- `research-run` (providerless): create local-first cited research run artifacts
  - Input: `researchCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Question`, `OutputDir`, `TrustedSources`, `Sources`, `GenerateTasks`
  - Flags: `--research-run`, `--research-output`, `--trusted-source`, `--research-source`, `--output`, `--generate-tasks`
  - Examples: `atteler research run "Compare approaches for plugin sandboxing in Go CLIs"`, `atteler research run --output .atteler/research/plugin-sandboxing --generate-tasks "Find viable implementation approaches for sandboxing Atteler plugins"`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `filesystem-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `markdown`, `json`, `yaml`, `filesystem`, `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --research-run value` -> `research-run`
- `task-command` (providerless): read or mutate persistent agent tasks
  - Input: `taskCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `FilePath`, `AddTitle`, `AddID`, `Agent`, `AssignSpec`, `CompleteID`, `List`
  - Flags: `--task-list`, `--task-add`, `--task-id`, `--task-agent`, `--task-assign`, `--task-complete`, `--task-file`
  - Examples: `atteler agents task-list`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
    - `one-of-flags` with `--task-list`, `--task-add`, `--task-assign`, `--task-complete`: task command validates exactly one task operation
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `task-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --task-list` -> `task-command`
- `eval-output` (providerless): compare actual output against expected text/file or structured assertions
  - Input: `evalOutputCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `ActualPath`, `ExpectedText`, `ExpectedPath`, `Mode`
  - Flags: `--eval-output`, `--eval-assertions`, `--eval-fixture-dir`, `--eval-expected`, `--eval-expected-file`, `--eval-mode`, `--eval-exit-code`, `--eval-json`, `--eval-report`, `--eval-update-golden`, `--eval-approve-golden-update`
  - Examples: `atteler eval output actual.txt --eval-expected "ok"`, `atteler eval run output.eval.yaml --eval-json`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `filesystem-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`, `json`, `filesystem`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --eval-output value` -> `eval-output`
- `context-pack` (providerless): compact a role-prefixed transcript file
  - Input: `contextPackCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Path`, `Model`, `MaxTokens`
  - Flags: `--context-pack-file`, `--context-pack-tokens`, `--model`
  - Examples: `atteler memory context-pack transcript.txt`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --context-pack-file value` -> `context-pack`
- `init-rtk-plugin` (providerless): write an RTK plugin scaffold
  - Input: `initRTKPluginCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Dir`
  - Flags: `--init-rtk-plugin`
  - Examples: `atteler plugins init-rtk .atteler/plugins/rtk`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `filesystem-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `filesystem`, `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --init-rtk-plugin value` -> `init-rtk-plugin`
- `lsp-symbols` (providerless): request symbols from an external LSP
  - Input: `lspSymbolsCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Command`, `FilePath`, `RootPath`, `LanguageID`, `WorkspaceSymbols`, `OutputFormat`, `Args`, `DocumentSymbols`, `JSON`
  - Flags: `--lsp-symbols`, `--lsp-workspace-symbols`, `--lsp-command`, `--lsp-file`, `--lsp-root`, `--lsp-language`, `--lsp-arg`, `--json`, `--output`
  - Examples: `atteler code-intel lsp-symbols --lsp-file main.go`, `atteler code-intel lsp-workspace Handler --json`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `process-execute`, `filesystem-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`, `json`
  - Code-intel queries:
    - `lsp-symbols` / `--lsp-symbols`: request document symbols from an external LSP
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<n>\trange=<start-end>[\tdetail=<detail>][\tcontainer=<name>][\turi=<uri>]`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `lsp_symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel lsp-symbols --lsp-file main.go`
    - `lsp-workspace <query>` / `--lsp-workspace-symbols`: request workspace symbols from an external LSP
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<n>\trange=<start-end>[\tdetail=<detail>][\tcontainer=<name>][\turi=<uri>]`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `lsp_symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel lsp-workspace Handler --json`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --lsp-symbols` -> `lsp-symbols`
- `memory-command` (providerless): search or update the local UTF-8 file memory store
  - Input: `memoryCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Search`, `StorePath`, `DeleteID`, `IndexFiles`, `Limit`, `TTLSeconds`, `IncludeSessionMessages`, `IncludeWorktreeMetadata`, `Migrate`, `Compact`
  - Flags: `--memory-search`, `--memory-index`, `--memory-delete`, `--memory-compact`, `--memory-migrate`, `--memory-store`, `--memory-limit`, `--memory-ttl-seconds`, `--memory-include-session-messages`, `--memory-include-worktree-metadata`, `--memory-scope`, `--memory-session`, `--memory-repo`, `--memory-tag`, `--memory-since`, `--memory-until`, `--memory-agent`, `--memory-global`, `--memory-purge`, `--memory-rebuild`, `--memory-list-corpus`, `--memory-redact`, `--memory-retention-days`
  - Examples: `atteler memory search "OAuth retry storm"`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `filesystem-write`, `session-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --memory-search value` -> `memory-command`
- `vector-search` (providerless-config): search local lexical or embedding vector indexes
  - Input: `vectorSearchCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Query`, `IndexFiles`, `Vector`, `Limit`
  - Flags: `--vector-search`, `--vector-index`, `--vector-limit`, `--vector-store`, `--vectorizer`, `--vector-provider`, `--vector-model`, `--vector-base-url`, `--vector-fallback`, `--vector-timeout-seconds`, `--vector-chunk-max-runes`, `--vector-chunk-overlap-runes`
  - Examples: `atteler memory vector-search "redirect risks"`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `filesystem-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --vector-search value` -> `vector-search`
- `issue-implement` (providerless): implement one tracker issue through Symphony and optionally open a verified PR
  - Input: `issueImplementCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `IssueRef`, `WorkflowPath`, `BaseBranch`, `OpenPR`, `RunTests`, `RunLint`, `UpdateDocs`, `UpdateChangelog`
  - Flags: `--issue-implement`, `--issue-workflow`, `--open-pr`, `--base`, `--run-tests`, `--run-lint`, `--update-docs`, `--update-changelog`
  - Examples: `atteler issue implement GH-218 --open-pr --run-tests --run-lint`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `config-read`, `filesystem-read`, `filesystem-write`, `git-read`, `git-write`, `network`, `process-execute`, `worktree-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --issue-implement value` -> `issue-implement`
- `mcp-invoke` (providerless): invoke an MCP tool or JSON-RPC method
  - Input: `mcpInvokeCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `ManifestPath`, `ServerName`, `Method`, `ParamsJSON`, `ToolName`, `ToolArgsJSON`, `TimeoutSeconds`
  - Flags: `--mcp-tool`, `--mcp-method`, `--mcp-manifest`, `--mcp-server`, `--mcp-params`, `--mcp-tool-args`, `--mcp-timeout-seconds`
  - Examples: `atteler plugins tool lookup --mcp-manifest mcp.yaml --mcp-server local`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
    - `explicit-precedence` with `mcp-manifest`: this command intentionally wins when these supplemental flags are also present
  - Overrides: `mcp-manifest`
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `process-execute`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `json`, `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --mcp-tool value` -> `mcp-invoke`
- `mcp-manifest` (providerless): validate or list an MCP manifest
  - Input: `mcpManifestCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Path`, `Capability`
  - Flags: `--mcp-manifest`, `--mcp-capability`
  - Examples: `atteler plugins manifest .atteler/mcp.yaml`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --mcp-manifest value` -> `mcp-manifest`
- `speculate-plan` (providerless): print a speculative three-round execution plan
  - Input: `speculatePlanCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Prompt`, `Agents`, `Gates`
  - Flags: `--speculate-plan`, `--speculate-agent`, `--speculate-gate`, `--speculate-prompt`
  - Examples: `atteler agents speculate-plan`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --speculate-plan` -> `speculate-plan`
- `review-plan` (providerless): print speculative review-agent plan
  - Input: `reviewPlanCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Agents`, `Paths`, `Gates`
  - Flags: `--review-plan`, `--review-agent`, `--review-path`, `--review-gate`
  - Examples: `atteler review plan`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --review-plan` -> `review-plan`
- `async-plan` (providerless): print dependency-aware async task batches
  - Input: `asyncPlanCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `TaskSpecs`
  - Flags: `--async-plan`, `--async-task`
  - Examples: `atteler agents async-plan --async-task build|coder|make`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --async-plan` -> `async-plan`
- `route-models-providerless` (providerless): rank model route candidates
  - Input: `routeModelsCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Candidates`, `Policy`, `Profile`
  - Flags: `--route-interactive`, `--route-batch`, `--route-candidate`, `--route-input-tokens`, `--route-output-tokens`, `--route-cache-write-tokens`, `--route-budget`, `--route-cache-reuse`, `--route-required-capability`
  - Examples: `atteler providers route-interactive --route-candidate openai/gpt-fast,input=0.001,output=0.002,max=1000`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --route-interactive` -> `route-models-providerless`
- `suggest-skill` (providerless): suggest reusable skills from repeated observed actions and manage automatically learned skills
  - Input: `suggestSkillCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `SaveDir`, `LearningDir`, `LearningSkillDir`, `LearningShow`, `LearningEdit`, `LearningEnable`, `LearningDisable`, `LearningDelete`, `Steps`, `MaxSteps`, `MinOccurrences`, `ReviewOnly`, `LearningList`, `LearningEnableAll`, `LearningDisableAll`
  - Flags: `--skill-step`, `--skill-save-dir`, `--skill-review-only`, `--skill-max-steps`, `--skill-min-occurrences`, `--skill-learning-list`, `--skill-learning-show`, `--skill-learning-edit`, `--skill-learning-enable`, `--skill-learning-disable`, `--skill-learning-delete`, `--skill-learning-enable-all`, `--skill-learning-disable-all`, `--skill-learning-dir`, `--skill-learning-skill-dir`
  - Examples: `atteler agents skill-suggest "inspect file"`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
    - `one-of-flags` with `--skill-step`, `--skill-learning-list`, `--skill-learning-show`, `--skill-learning-edit`, `--skill-learning-enable`, `--skill-learning-disable`, `--skill-learning-delete`, `--skill-learning-enable-all`, `--skill-learning-disable-all`: skill suggestion validates exactly one suggestion or management operation
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `filesystem-write`, `process-execute`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --skill-step value` -> `suggest-skill`
- `state-diagnostics` (providerless-config): print persisted interactive state diagnostics
  - Input: `stateDiagnosticsCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `SessionRef`, `AgentName`, `Model`, `ModelMode`, `ReasoningLevel`
  - Flags: `--state-diagnostics`, `--session`, `--agent`, `--model`, `--model-mode`, `--reasoning-level`
  - Examples: `atteler config state`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `config-read`, `state-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `yaml`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --state-diagnostics` -> `state-diagnostics`

  - Flags: `--list-agents`
  - Examples: `atteler agents list`

    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --list-agents` -> `list-agents`

  - Flags: `--run-plugin`, `--plugin-entrypoint`, `--plugin-dry-run`, `--plugin-timeout-seconds`
  - Examples: `atteler plugins run reviewer/check`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `config-read`, `filesystem-read`, `process-execute`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `process`, `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --run-plugin value` -> `run-plugin-providerless`
- `code-intel` (providerless-config): run code-intelligence index, shared query, import graph, package/file/symbol, and impact queries
  - Input: `codeIntelCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `ModelQuery`, `ModelLanguage`, `SymbolName`, `SymbolFileSummary`, `SymbolPackageSummary`, `SymbolPrefix`, `SymbolPrefixFileSummary`, `SymbolPrefixPackageSummary`, `SymbolKind`, `SymbolKindFileSummary`, `SymbolKindPackageSummary`, `ImpactTarget`, `ImportPath`, `ImportPathSummary`, `ImportPathFileSummary`, `ImportPathPackageSummary`, `ImportPrefix`, `ImportPrefixSummary`, `ImportPrefixFileSummary`, `ImportPrefixPackageSummary`, `ReachTarget`, `DepsTarget`, `RDepsTarget`, `PackageName`, `PackageImports`, `PackageImportPath`, `PackageImportFiles`, `PackageImportPathFileSummary`, `PackageImportPrefix`, `PackageImportPrefixFiles`, `PackageImportPrefixFileSummary`, `PackageImportFileSummary`, `PackageSymbols`, `PackageSymbolFileSummary`, `PackageSymbolName`, `PackageSymbolNameFileSummary`, `PackageSymbolList`, `PackageSymbolKind`, `PackageSymbolKindFileSummary`, `PackageSymbolPrefix`, `PackageSymbolPrefixFileSummary`, `FilePath`, `FileImports`, `FileSymbols`, `FileSymbolSummary`, `FileSymbolName`, `FileSymbolKind`, `FileSymbolPrefix`, `FileImportPrefix`, `FileImportPath`, `OutputFormat`, `Limit`, `Offset`, `ListImports`, `ListImportSummary`, `ListImportFileSummary`, `ListLayers`, `ListCycles`, `Summary`, `ListFiles`, `ListSymbolSummary`, `ListSymbolFileSummary`, `ListPackageImportSummary`, `ListPackages`, `JSON`
  - Flags: `--code-symbol`, `--code-symbol-name-file-summary`, `--code-symbol-name-package-summary`, `--code-symbol-prefix`, `--code-symbol-prefix-file-summary`, `--code-symbol-prefix-package-summary`, `--code-symbol-kind`, `--code-symbol-kind-file-summary`, `--code-symbol-kind-package-summary`, `--code-symbol-summary`, `--code-symbol-file-summary`, `--code-imports`, `--code-import-summary`, `--code-import-file-summary`, `--code-import-path`, `--code-import-path-summary`, `--code-import-path-file-summary`, `--code-import-path-package-summary`, `--code-import-prefix`, `--code-import-prefix-summary`, `--code-import-prefix-file-summary`, `--code-import-prefix-package-summary`, `--code-packages`, `--code-package`, `--code-package-import-summary`, `--code-package-imports`, `--code-package-import-path`, `--code-package-import-files`, `--code-package-import-path-file-summary`, `--code-package-import-prefix`, `--code-package-import-prefix-files`, `--code-package-import-prefix-file-summary`, `--code-package-import-file-summary`, `--code-package-symbols`, `--code-package-symbol-file-summary`, `--code-package-symbol`, `--code-package-symbol-name-file-summary`, `--code-package-symbol-list`, `--code-package-symbol-kind`, `--code-package-symbol-kind-file-summary`, `--code-package-symbol-prefix`, `--code-package-symbol-prefix-file-summary`, `--code-file`, `--code-file-imports`, `--code-file-symbols`, `--code-file-symbol-summary`, `--code-file-symbol`, `--code-file-symbol-kind`, `--code-file-symbol-prefix`, `--code-file-import-prefix`, `--code-file-import-path`, `--code-query`, `--code-layers`, `--code-cycles`, `--code-summary`, `--code-files`, `--code-impact`, `--code-reachable`, `--code-deps`, `--code-rdeps`, `--code-language`, `--code-limit`, `--code-offset`, `--json`, `--output`
  - Examples: `atteler code-intel summary`, `atteler code-intel summary --json`, `atteler code-intel query definitions:Run`, `atteler code-intel symbol NewRegistry`, `atteler code-intel import-prefix github.com/tommoulard/atteler/pkg/`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
    - `one-of-flags` with `--code-*`: code-intel subcommands are resolved by their own one-command matcher
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`, `json`
  - Code-intel queries:
    - `symbol <name>` / `--code-symbol`: find Go symbols by exact name
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tpath=<path>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol Run`
    - `symbol-name-file-summary <name>` / `--code-symbol-name-file-summary`: list files with symbol counts for one exact name
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-name-file-summary Run`
    - `symbol-name-package-summary <name>` / `--code-symbol-name-package-summary`: list packages with symbol counts for one exact name
      - Text output: `package=<package>\tfiles=<n>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `packages`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-name-package-summary Run`
    - `symbol-prefix <prefix>` / `--code-symbol-prefix`: find Go symbols by name prefix
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tpath=<path>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-prefix Ru`
    - `symbol-prefix-file-summary <prefix>` / `--code-symbol-prefix-file-summary`: list files with symbol counts for names matching a prefix
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-prefix-file-summary Ru`
    - `symbol-prefix-package-summary <prefix>` / `--code-symbol-prefix-package-summary`: list packages with symbol counts for names matching a prefix
      - Text output: `package=<package>\tfiles=<n>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `packages`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-prefix-package-summary Ru`
    - `symbol-kind <kind>` / `--code-symbol-kind`: list Go symbols by kind
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tpath=<path>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-kind func`
    - `symbol-kind-file-summary <kind>` / `--code-symbol-kind-file-summary`: list files with symbol counts for one kind
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-kind-file-summary func`
    - `symbol-kind-package-summary <kind>` / `--code-symbol-kind-package-summary`: list packages with symbol counts for one kind
      - Text output: `package=<package>\tfiles=<n>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `packages`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-kind-package-summary func`
    - `symbol-summary` / `--code-symbol-summary`: list symbol kind counts
      - Text output: `kind=<kind>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-summary`
    - `symbol-file-summary` / `--code-symbol-file-summary`: list files with total symbol counts
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel symbol-file-summary`
    - `imports` / `--code-imports`: list Go import edges
      - Text output: `path=<path>\timport=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `edges`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel imports`
    - `import-summary` / `--code-import-summary`: list import paths with usage counts
      - Text output: `import=<path>\tfiles=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `imports`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel import-summary`
    - `import-file-summary` / `--code-import-file-summary`: list files with import counts
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\timports=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel import-file-summary`
    - `import-path <path>` / `--code-import-path`: list files importing one exact path
      - Text output: `path=<path>\timport=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `edges`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel import-path context`
    - `import-path-summary <path>` / `--code-import-path-summary`: summarize usage for one exact import path
      - Text output: `import=<path>\tfiles=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `imports`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel import-path-summary context`
    - `import-path-file-summary <path>` / `--code-import-path-file-summary`: list files with import counts for one exact path
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\timports=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel import-path-file-summary context`
    - `import-path-package-summary <path>` / `--code-import-path-package-summary`: list packages importing one exact path
      - Text output: `package=<package>\tfiles=<n>[\timports=<n>]`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `packages`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel import-path-package-summary context`
    - `import-prefix <prefix>` / `--code-import-prefix`: list files importing paths with one prefix
      - Text output: `path=<path>\timport=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `edges`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel import-prefix con`
    - `import-prefix-summary <prefix>` / `--code-import-prefix-summary`: summarize usage for import paths matching a prefix

      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `packages`

    - `packages` / `--code-packages`: list Go packages with file and symbol counts

      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `packages`

    - `package <package>` / `--code-package`: list files and symbol counts for one package

      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package main`
    - `package-import-summary` / `--code-package-import-summary`: list packages with import counts

      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `packages`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-import-summary`
    - `package-imports <package>` / `--code-package-imports`: list import usage counts for one package

      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`

      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-imports main`

      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`

      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-import-file-summary main`
    - `package-symbols <package>` / `--code-package-symbols`: list symbol kind counts for one package

      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`

    - `package-symbol-file-summary <package>` / `--code-package-symbol-file-summary`: list files in one package with symbol counts
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-symbol-file-summary main`
    - `package-symbol <package:name>` / `--code-package-symbol`: list symbols for one package and exact name
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tpath=<path>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-symbol main:Run`
    - `package-symbol-name-file-summary <package:name>` / `--code-package-symbol-name-file-summary`: list files in one package with symbol counts for an exact name
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-symbol-name-file-summary main:Run`
    - `package-symbol-list <package>` / `--code-package-symbol-list`: list symbols declared in one package
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tpath=<path>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-symbol-list main`
    - `package-symbol-kind <package:kind>` / `--code-package-symbol-kind`: list symbols for one package and kind
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tpath=<path>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-symbol-kind main:func`
    - `package-symbol-kind-file-summary <package:kind>` / `--code-package-symbol-kind-file-summary`: list files in one package with symbol counts for one kind
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-symbol-kind-file-summary main:func`
    - `package-symbol-prefix <package:prefix>` / `--code-package-symbol-prefix`: list symbols for one package and name prefix
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tpath=<path>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-symbol-prefix main:Ru`
    - `package-symbol-prefix-file-summary <package:prefix>` / `--code-package-symbol-prefix-file-summary`: list files in one package with symbol counts for a prefix
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel package-symbol-prefix-file-summary main:Ru`
    - `file <path>` / `--code-file`: print package, symbols, and imports for one file
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\timports=<n>\tsymbols=<n>, then imports/symbols sections`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel file runner.go`
    - `file-imports <path>` / `--code-file-imports`: list imports for one Go file
      - Text output: `import=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `imports`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel file-imports runner.go`
    - `file-symbols <path>` / `--code-file-symbols`: list symbols for one Go file
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel file-symbols runner.go`
    - `file-symbol-summary <path>` / `--code-file-symbol-summary`: list symbol kind counts for one Go file
      - Text output: `kind=<kind>\tsymbols=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel file-symbol-summary runner.go`
    - `file-symbol <path:name>` / `--code-file-symbol`: list symbols for one file and exact name
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel file-symbol runner.go:Run`
    - `file-symbol-kind <path:kind>` / `--code-file-symbol-kind`: list symbols for one file and kind
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel file-symbol-kind runner.go:func`
    - `file-symbol-prefix <path:prefix>` / `--code-file-symbol-prefix`: list symbols for one file and name prefix
      - Text output: `<name>\tkind=<kind>\tline=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `symbols`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel file-symbol-prefix runner.go:Ru`
    - `file-import-prefix <path:prefix>` / `--code-file-import-prefix`: list imports for one file matching a prefix
      - Text output: `import=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `imports`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel file-import-prefix runner.go:con`
    - `file-import-path <path:import>` / `--code-file-import-path`: check one file import path
      - Text output: `import=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `imports`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel file-import-path runner.go:context`
    - `query <kind[:value]>` / `--code-query`: query the shared multi-language code-intelligence index
      - Text output: `type=<record>\tlanguage=<language>[\tname=<name>][\tkind=<kind>][\tpath=<path>][\tline=<n>]...`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `records`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel query definitions:Run`
    - `layers` / `--code-layers`: list topological Go import graph layers
      - Text output: `layer=<n>\tnodes=<path>,<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `layers`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel layers`
    - `cycles` / `--code-cycles`: list Go import graph cycles
      - Text output: `cycle=<n>\tnodes=<path> -> <path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `cycles`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel cycles`
    - `summary` / `--code-summary`: print compact Go code index counts
      - Text output: `files=<n>\tpackages=<n>\tsymbols=<n>\timports=<n>\tnodes=<n>\tedges=<n>\tcycles=<n>\tlayers=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `summary`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel summary`
    - `files` / `--code-files`: list Go files with package/import/symbol counts
      - Text output: `path=<path>\tpackage=<package>\tsymbols=<n>\timports=<n>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `files`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel files`
    - `impact <path>` / `--code-impact`: list files impacted by an import path
      - Text output: `path=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `impact_set`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel impact context`
    - `reachable <path>` / `--code-reachable`: list reachable import graph nodes
      - Text output: `node=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `nodes`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel reachable runner.go`
    - `deps <path>` / `--code-deps`: list direct import graph dependencies
      - Text output: `node=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `nodes`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel deps runner.go`
    - `rdeps <path>` / `--code-rdeps`: list direct reverse dependencies
      - Text output: `node=<path>`
      - JSON schema: `atteler.code_intel.v1`
      - JSON fields: `schema`, `command`, `query`, `empty`, `message`, `pagination`, `nodes`
      - Examples: `atteler code-intel rdeps context`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --code-symbol value` -> `code-intel`
- `incident-diagnose-providerless` (providerless-config): diagnose a production incident from Sentry, MCP, or redacted JSON without starting the repair agent loop
  - Input: `incidentDiagnoseOnlyCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `SentryIssue`, `Reference`, `FilePath`, `SentryOrg`, `SentryBaseURL`, `SentryTokenEnv`, `SentryEventID`, `MCPManifestPath`, `MCPServerName`, `MCPToolName`, `MCPToolArgsJSON`, `ReproCommand`, `ValidationCommands`, `ReportPath`, `PRBodyPath`, `OutputFormat`, `TimeoutSeconds`, `JSON`
  - Flags: `--incident-diagnose`, `--sentry`, `--incident-ref`, `--incident-file`, `--incident-sentry-org`, `--incident-sentry-url`, `--incident-sentry-token-env`, `--incident-sentry-event`, `--incident-mcp-manifest`, `--incident-mcp-server`, `--incident-mcp-tool`, `--incident-mcp-tool-args`, `--incident-repro-command`, `--incident-validation-command`, `--incident-timeout-seconds`, `--incident-report`, `--incident-pr-body`, `--output`, `--json`
  - Examples: `atteler incident diagnose --sentry ISSUE-912`, `atteler incident diagnose --incident-file redacted-sentry-event.json --incident-report .atteler/incident.md`, `atteler incident diagnose --incident-ref alert-42 --incident-mcp-manifest .atteler/mcp.yaml --incident-mcp-server grafana --incident-mcp-tool get_incident`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `config-read`, `filesystem-read`, `filesystem-write`, `git-read`, `network-read`, `process-execute`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`, `json`, `markdown`, `filesystem`, `process`
  - Fixtures:
    - `incident-file`: `atteler --incident-diagnose --incident-file incident.json` -> `incident-diagnose-providerless`
- `git-history-search-providerless` (providerless-config): search local git history subjects, files, and authors
  - Input: `gitHistorySearchCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Query`, `Limit`
  - Flags: `--git-history-search`, `--git-history-limit`

    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise

  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --git-history-search value` -> `git-history-search-providerless`

  - Flags: `--retrieval-search`, `--retrieval-source`, `--retrieval-filter`, `--retrieval-limit`, `--retrieval-explain`, `--retrieval-include-unsafe`, `--memory-store`, `--memory-index`, `--vector-index`, `--agent-memory-store`, `--agent-memory-agent`, `--agent`, `--vector-store`, `--vectorizer`, `--vector-provider`, `--vector-model`, `--vector-base-url`, `--vector-fallback`, `--vector-timeout-seconds`, `--vector-chunk-max-runes`, `--vector-chunk-overlap-runes`
  - Examples: `atteler memory retrieve "OAuth retry storm" --retrieval-source session --retrieval-filter default_model=gpt-review --retrieval-include-unsafe --retrieval-explain`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `config-read`, `filesystem-read`, `filesystem-write`, `git-read`, `session-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --retrieval-search value` -> `retrieval-search`

- `session-read` (stateful): read selected session details, transcripts, summaries, and records
  - Input: `sessionReadCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `ReplayRef`, `ShowSessionRef`, `SummarySessionRef`, `ExportRef`, `ExportFormat`, `ShowRunRef`, `ExportRunRef`, `ReplayRunRef`, `ResumeRunRef`, `ListArtifacts`, `ListEvaluations`, `ListFailures`, `ListMessages`, `ListRuns`
  - Flags: `--show-session`, `--session-summary`, `--replay`, `--export-session`, `--export-format`, `--show-run`, `--export-run`, `--replay-run`, `--resume-run`, `--list-artifacts`, `--list-evaluations`, `--list-failures`, `--list-messages`, `--list-runs`
  - Examples: `atteler session show demo`, `atteler session --session demo runs`, `atteler session --session demo replay-run latest`, `atteler session --session demo resume-run review`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
    - `one-of-flags` with `--show-session`, `--session-summary`, `--replay`, `--export-session`, `--show-run`, `--export-run`, `--replay-run`, `--resume-run`, `--list-artifacts`, `--list-evaluations`, `--list-failures`, `--list-messages`, `--list-runs`: session read aliases select exactly one read operation
  - Side effects: `session-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`, `yaml`, `markdown`, `json`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --show-session value` -> `session-read`
- `session-write` (stateful): write selected session records or audited feedback patches
  - Input: `sessionWriteCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `RecordFailure`, `FailureReason`, `FailureCommit`, `FailureTaskType`, `FailureSeverity`, `RecordEvaluation`, `EvaluationOutcome`, `EvaluationNotes`, `EvaluationReference`, `EvaluationSource`, `EvaluationEvaluator`, `EvaluationRubricVersion`, `EvaluationTaskType`, `EvaluationDifficulty`, `EvaluationExpectedOutcome`, `EvaluationProvider`, `EvaluationModel`, `EvaluationFixtureVersion`, `EvaluationAgentVersion`, `EvaluationReportPath`, `EvaluationScore`, `EvaluationPassRate`, `EvaluationFlakeCount`, `EvaluationDurationMillis`, `EvaluationInputTokens`, `EvaluationOutputTokens`, `EvaluationTotalTokens`, `EvaluationCost`, `EvaluationConfidence`, `RecordArtifact`, `ArtifactKind`, `ArtifactLogicalPath`, `ArtifactReviewStatus`, `ArtifactSummary`, `FeedbackApplyConfig`, `FeedbackHistoryPath`
  - Flags: `--record-failure`, `--failure-reason`, `--failure-commit`, `--failure-task-type`, `--failure-severity`, `--record-evaluation`, `--evaluation-outcome`, `--evaluation-notes`, `--evaluation-reference`, `--evaluation-source`, `--evaluation-evaluator`, `--evaluation-rubric-version`, `--evaluation-task-type`, `--evaluation-difficulty`, `--evaluation-expected-outcome`, `--evaluation-provider`, `--evaluation-model`, `--evaluation-fixture-version`, `--evaluation-agent-version`, `--evaluation-report`, `--evaluation-score`, `--evaluation-pass-rate`, `--evaluation-flake-count`, `--evaluation-duration-millis`, `--evaluation-input-tokens`, `--evaluation-output-tokens`, `--evaluation-total-tokens`, `--evaluation-cost`, `--evaluation-confidence`, `--record-artifact`, `--artifact-kind`, `--artifact-logical-path`, `--artifact-review-status`, `--artifact-summary`, `--feedback-apply-config`, `--feedback-history`
  - Examples: `atteler session record-failure bad-attempt --session demo`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
    - `one-of-flags` with `--record-failure`, `--record-evaluation`, `--record-artifact`, `--feedback-apply-config`: session write aliases select exactly one mutation
  - Side effects: `filesystem-write`, `session-store-read`, `session-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --record-failure value` -> `session-write`
- `speculate-run` (stateful): execute the full speculative three-round pipeline
  - Input: `speculateRunCommandInput`

- `async-run` (stateful): execute dependency-aware async tasks by spawning Atteler sub-agents
  - Input: `asyncRunCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `SpawnBinary`, `TaskSpecs`, `Execution`, `TimeoutSeconds`
  - Flags: `--async-run`, `--async-task`, `--spawn-binary`, `--spawn-cancel-on-failure`, `--spawn-cost-budget-micros`, `--spawn-ledger`, `--spawn-max-concurrency`, `--spawn-output-budget-bytes`, `--spawn-resume`, `--spawn-retries`, `--spawn-retry-backoff-seconds`, `--spawn-task-timeout-seconds`, `--spawn-timeout-seconds`, `--spawn-token-budget`
  - Examples: `atteler agents async-run --async-task build|coder|make`

    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `llm-provider-read`, `process-execute`, `session-store-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --async-run` -> `async-run`
- `incident-diagnose` (stateful): diagnose a production incident and run the redacted fix prompt through the selected Atteler agent
  - Input: `incidentDiagnoseCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `SentryIssue`, `Reference`, `FilePath`, `SentryOrg`, `SentryBaseURL`, `SentryTokenEnv`, `SentryEventID`, `MCPManifestPath`, `MCPServerName`, `MCPToolName`, `MCPToolArgsJSON`, `ReproCommand`, `ValidationCommands`, `ReportPath`, `PRBodyPath`, `OutputFormat`, `TimeoutSeconds`, `JSON`, `ApplyFix`, `OpenPR`
  - Flags: `--incident-diagnose`, `--incident-apply-fix`, `--sentry`, `--incident-ref`, `--incident-file`, `--incident-sentry-org`, `--incident-sentry-url`, `--incident-sentry-token-env`, `--incident-sentry-event`, `--incident-mcp-manifest`, `--incident-mcp-server`, `--incident-mcp-tool`, `--incident-mcp-tool-args`, `--incident-repro-command`, `--incident-validation-command`, `--incident-timeout-seconds`, `--incident-report`, `--incident-pr-body`, `--incident-open-pr`, `--output`
  - Examples: `atteler incident diagnose --sentry ISSUE-912 --incident-apply-fix --incident-validation-command "go test ./pkg/auth"`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `filesystem-write`, `git-read`, `llm-provider-read`, `network-read`, `process-execute`, `stdout`, `worktree-write`
  - Outputs: `text`, `filesystem`, `process`
  - Fixtures:
    - `apply-fix`: `atteler --incident-diagnose --incident-apply-fix --incident-file incident.json` -> `incident-diagnose`
- `spawn-agents` (stateful): spawn sub-agent one-shot prompts
  - Input: `spawnAgentsCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Specs`, `Binary`, `TimeoutSeconds`, `DryRun`, `Execution`
  - Flags: `--spawn-agent`, `--spawn-binary`, `--spawn-cancel-on-failure`, `--spawn-cost-budget-micros`, `--spawn-dry-run`, `--spawn-ledger`, `--spawn-max-concurrency`, `--spawn-output-budget-bytes`, `--spawn-resume`, `--spawn-retries`, `--spawn-retry-backoff-seconds`, `--spawn-task-timeout-seconds`, `--spawn-timeout-seconds`, `--spawn-token-budget`

    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --spawn-agent value` -> `spawn-agents`

  - Flags: `--agent-memory-search`, `--agent-memory-index`, `--agent-memory-delete`, `--agent-memory-compact`, `--agent-memory-migrate`, `--agent-memory-store`, `--agent-memory-agent`, `--agent-memory-limit`, `--agent-memory-ttl-seconds`

  - Input fields: `OutputPath`, `Format`, `MaxBytes`
  - Flags: `--merge-artifacts`, `--merge-artifacts-format`, `--merge-artifact-max-bytes`

  - Outputs: `markdown`, `json`, `filesystem`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --merge-artifacts value` -> `merge-artifacts`
- `feedback-proposals` (stateful): derive agent improvement proposals from the selected session
  - Input: `feedbackProposalsCommandInput`
  - Flags: `--feedback-proposals`
  - Examples: `atteler agents feedback --session demo`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `session-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --feedback-proposals` -> `feedback-proposals`
- `list-models` (stateful): list models discovered from configured providers
  - Input: `listModelsCommandInput`
  - Flags: `--list-models`
  - Examples: `atteler providers models`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `llm-provider-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`

    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --list-models` -> `list-models`
- `explain-model-resolution` (stateful): explain how a model ID resolves to a provider

  - Input fields: `Model`
  - Flags: `--explain-model-resolution`
  - Examples: `atteler providers resolve gpt-5.5`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `llm-provider-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --explain-model-resolution value` -> `explain-model-resolution`
- `doctor` (stateful): print local readiness diagnostics with provider health checks
  - Input: `doctorCommandInput`
  - Flags: `--doctor`
  - Examples: `atteler config doctor`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `config-read`, `filesystem-read`, `llm-provider-read`, `state-store-read`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --doctor` -> `doctor`

- `merge-worktree` (inline): merge a session worktree back into its base branch
  - Input: `mergeWorktreeCommandInput`
  - Input fields: `Ref`, `VerificationCommands`, `AllowBaseMismatch`, `OverrideVerification`
  - Flags: `--merge-worktree`, `--merge-worktree-allow-base-mismatch`, `--worktree-verify-command`, `--worktree-merge-override`
  - Examples: `atteler worktrees merge 20260430-120000-deadbeef`
  - Conflicts:
    - `exclusive-command` with `*`: command-triggering flags are mutually exclusive unless an explicit precedence rule declares otherwise
  - Side effects: `filesystem-read`, `git-read`, `process-execute`, `worktree-write`, `stdout`
  - Outputs: `text`
  - Fixtures:
    - `legacy-flag`: `atteler --merge-worktree value` -> `merge-worktree`

## Options (flags)

Every CLI option below has its own section with its type, default, and an
example. This list is generated from the actual flag registrations, so it always
matches the binary.

<!-- Code generated by `go generate ./internal/docgen`; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Every CLI option, one section each. There are 406 options. Flags combine with
the grouped domain commands (before or after the subcommand). Boolean flags
default to off unless noted; omitted values are not sent to providers.

### `--agent`

Agent name to use for prompts

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --agent <value>
```

### `--agent-memory-agent`

Agent namespace for per-agent vector memory; defaults to --agent

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --agent-memory-agent <value>
```

### `--agent-memory-compact`

Remove expired documents from per-agent vector memory and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --agent-memory-compact
```

### `--agent-memory-delete`

Delete one document ID from one agent's vector memory and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --agent-memory-delete <value>
```

### `--agent-memory-index`

File to add to one agent's vector memory (repeatable or comma-separated)

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --agent-memory-index <value>
```

### `--agent-memory-limit`

Maximum per-agent memory search results

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --agent-memory-limit <value>
```

### `--agent-memory-migrate`

Explicitly migrate and re-vectorize a per-agent memory store

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --agent-memory-migrate
```

### `--agent-memory-search`

Search one agent's vector memory and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --agent-memory-search <value>
```

### `--agent-memory-store`

JSON store for per-agent vector memory

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --agent-memory-store <value>
```

### `--agent-memory-ttl-seconds`

Expire newly indexed agent memory after this many seconds

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --agent-memory-ttl-seconds <value>
```

### `--agent-performance-summary`

Summarize recorded agent performance across saved sessions and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --agent-performance-summary
```

### `--allow-operation`

Permission operation to allow (repeatable/comma-separated): read, write, execute, network, credential_access, git_mutation, merge_delete

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --allow-operation <value>
```

### `--artifact-kind`

Kind for --record-artifact

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --artifact-kind <value>
```

### `--artifact-logical-path`

Logical target path/decision for --record-artifact conflict detection

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --artifact-logical-path <value>
```

### `--artifact-review-status`

Review status for --record-artifact

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --artifact-review-status <value>
```

### `--artifact-summary`

Summary for --record-artifact

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --artifact-summary <value>
```

### `--async-plan`

Print dependency-aware async task batches and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --async-plan
```

### `--async-run`

Execute dependency-aware async tasks by spawning Atteler sub-agents and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --async-run
```

### `--async-task`

Task spec for --async-plan/--async-run: id|agent|prompt|dep1+dep2 (repeatable or comma-separated)

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --async-task <value>
```

### `--auto-max-depth`

Maximum recursion depth for --auto self-forking before auto mode is suppressed

- **Type:** int
- **Default:** `2`

```sh
atteler --auto-max-depth <n>
```

### `--autonomy`

Risk-based autonomy for agent actions: low, medium, high, or full

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --autonomy <value>
```

### `--autoresearch`

Shortcut for --auto=autoresearch --worktree --headless --autonomy high with a positional mission prompt

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --autoresearch
```

### `--base`

Base branch override for --issue-implement

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --base <value>
```

### `--bash`

Run an explicit local bash command and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --bash <value>
```

### `--bash-dir`

Working directory for --bash

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --bash-dir <value>
```

### `--bash-timeout-seconds`

Timeout in seconds for --bash

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --bash-timeout-seconds <value>
```

### `--cancel-headless`

Cancel one live headless run by headless ID and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --cancel-headless <value>
```

### `--cleanup-headless`

Remove terminal headless runs older than --headless-max-age and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --cleanup-headless
```

### `--code-cycles`

List Go import graph cycles for the current repository and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --code-cycles
```

### `--code-deps`

List direct Go import graph dependencies for this file path or import path and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-deps <value>
```

### `--code-file`

Print Go package, symbols, and imports for one file and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-file <value>
```

### `--code-file-import-path`

Check/list one Go file import as path:import and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-file-import-path <value>
```

### `--code-file-import-prefix`

List imports for one Go file matching path:prefix and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-file-import-prefix <value>
```

### `--code-file-imports`

List imports for one Go file and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-file-imports <value>
```

### `--code-file-symbol`

List Go symbols for one file and exact name as path:name and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-file-symbol <value>
```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh

```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh

```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-file-symbol-summary <value>
```

List symbols for one Go file and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-file-symbols <value>
```

List Go files with package, import, and symbol counts and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --code-files
```

List Go files that directly or transitively import this path and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-impact <value>
```

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`


- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-import-path <value>
```

- **Default:** `""`

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

### `--code-imports`

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --code-imports
```

### `--code-language`

Filter --code-query by language, such as go or python

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-language <value>
```

### `--code-layers`

List topological Go import graph layers for the current repository and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --code-layers
```

### `--code-limit`

Maximum code-intel rows to emit for list-style results

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --code-limit <value>
```

### `--code-offset`

Number of code-intel rows to skip before emitting list-style results

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --code-offset <value>
```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-package <value>
```

- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-package-symbol-prefix-file-summary <value>
```

### `--code-package-symbols`

List symbol kind counts for one Go package and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-package-symbols <value>
```

### `--code-packages`

List Go packages with file and symbol counts and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --code-packages
```

### `--code-query`

Query the shared code-intelligence index: files, symbols, definitions, references, diagnostics, or relationships; optionally append :value

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-query <value>
```

### `--code-rdeps`

List direct Go import graph reverse dependencies for this file path or import path and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-rdeps <value>
```

### `--code-reachable`

List Go import graph nodes reachable from this file path or import path and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-reachable <value>
```

### `--code-summary`

Print compact Go code index and import graph counts and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --code-summary
```

### `--code-symbol`

Find Go symbols by exact name in the current repository and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol <value>
```

### `--code-symbol-file-summary`

List Go files with symbol counts and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-file-summary
```

### `--code-symbol-kind`

List Go symbols by kind (func, method, type, const, var) and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-kind <value>
```

### `--code-symbol-kind-file-summary`

List Go files with symbol counts for one kind and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-kind-file-summary <value>
```

List Go packages with file and symbol counts for one kind and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-kind-package-summary <value>
```

### `--code-symbol-name-file-summary`

List Go files with symbol counts for this exact name and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-name-file-summary <value>
```

### `--code-symbol-name-package-summary`

List Go packages with file and symbol counts for this exact name and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-name-package-summary <value>
```

### `--code-symbol-prefix`

Find Go symbols by name prefix in the current repository and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-prefix <value>
```

### `--code-symbol-prefix-file-summary`

List Go files with symbol counts for names matching this prefix and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-prefix-file-summary <value>
```

### `--code-symbol-prefix-package-summary`

List Go packages with file and symbol counts for names matching this prefix and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-prefix-package-summary <value>
```

### `--code-symbol-summary`

List Go symbol kinds with counts and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --code-symbol-summary
```

### `--command-surface-docs`

Render the inspectable CLI command surface as Markdown and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --command-surface-docs
```

### `--command-surface-json`

Dump the inspectable CLI command surface as JSON and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --command-surface-json
```

### `--config`

Additional YAML/JSON config file path(s); same format as ATTELER_CONFIG

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --config <value>
```

### `--config-migrate`

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh

```

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --config-report
```

Compact a role-prefixed transcript file and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --context-pack-file <value>
```

### `--context-pack-tokens`

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --context-pack-tokens <value>
```

### `--deny-operation`

Permission operation to deny (repeatable/comma-separated): read, write, execute, network, credential_access, git_mutation, merge_delete

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --deny-operation <value>
```

### `--describe-agent`

Print a configured agent as YAML and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --describe-agent <value>
```

### `--describe-plugin`

Print a configured plugin manifest as YAML and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --describe-plugin <value>
```

Print local readiness diagnostics and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --doctor
```

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --doctor-offline
```

- **Default:** `false`

```sh

```

- **Default:** `""`

- **Type:** value


- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

- **Default:** `""`


- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh

```

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh

```

Eval mode: exact, contains, or normalized

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `string(atteval.ModeContains)`

```sh
atteler --eval-mode <value>
```

Actual output file to compare and exit

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --eval-output <value>
```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh

```

- **Default:** `false`

- **Default:** `""`


- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --headless-max-age <value>
```

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --headless-private-log
```

Comma-separated statuses for --list-headless; defaults to all statuses

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --headless-status <value>
```

### `--incident-apply-fix`

Run the redacted incident fix prompt through the selected Atteler agent before validation and PR creation

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --incident-apply-fix
```

### `--incident-diagnose`

Diagnose a production incident from Sentry, MCP, or a redacted JSON file and exit

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --incident-diagnose
```

### `--incident-file`

Load redacted incident JSON from this file instead of a live integration

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-file <value>
```

MCP manifest YAML/JSON containing an observability incident tool

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-mcp-manifest <value>
```

MCP server name for incident diagnose

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-mcp-server <value>
```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-mcp-tool <value>
```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh

```

- **Type:** bool
- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --incident-open-pr
```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-pr-body <value>
```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-ref <value>
```

### `--incident-report`

Write the redacted incident diagnosis report to this path

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-report <value>
```

Safe local command to attempt reproducing the incident

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-repro-command <value>
```

### `--incident-sentry-event`

Specific Sentry event ID to fetch for stack traces

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-sentry-event <value>
```

### `--incident-sentry-org`

Sentry organization slug for --sentry; defaults to SENTRY_ORG

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-sentry-org <value>
```

### `--incident-sentry-token-env`

Environment variable containing the Sentry auth token; defaults to SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN, then SENTRY_ACCESS_TOKEN, then SENTRY_TOKEN

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-sentry-token-env <value>
```

### `--incident-sentry-url`

Sentry base URL for --sentry; defaults to SENTRY_BASE_URL, SENTRY_HOST, or https://sentry.io

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --incident-sentry-url <value>
```

### `--incident-timeout-seconds`

Timeout in seconds for incident integration, repro, validation, and PR commands

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --incident-timeout-seconds <value>
```

### `--incident-validation-command`

Validation command to run after diagnosis (repeatable)

- **Type:** value

```sh
atteler --incident-validation-command <value>
```

### `--init-config`

Write a starter YAML config to this path without overwriting

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`

```sh
atteler --init-config <value>
```

- **Type:** string
- **Default:** `""`


- **Default:** `""`


- **Default:** `false`

- **Default:** `false`

- **Default:** `false`

```sh
atteler --list-worktrees
```

### `--lsp-arg`
